mapper.select: select user_id from `t_data_align_following_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from t_following where user_id = #{userId}
select content_id from `t_data_align_content_like_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from t_content_like where content_id = #{contentId}
select content_id from `t_data_align_content_collect_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select user_id from `t_data_align_content_publish_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from t_content where creator_id = #{creatorId} and status = 1
select user_id from `t_data_align_fans_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from t_fans where user_id = #{userId}
select user_id from `t_data_align_user_like_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from t_content_like where user_id = #{userId}
select user_id from `t_data_align_user_collect_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from t_content_collection where user_id = #{userId}
